The '''Council Center''' was a building in the [[Agamar/Legends|Agamarian]] city of [[Calna Muun]]. It contained the [[Agamarian Council]]. It was done completely in wood and resembled an ocean; the councilors' benches looked like waves, and the speaker's podium resembled a stone washed up from the sea.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''
